abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Browser Mod can be added.

default_dashboard_plugin_conflict.title: Default Dashboard Plugin Conflict
default_dashboard_plugin_conflict.description:
Default-dashboard plugin is detected, which conflicts with Browser Mod default dashboard operation.

Please remove the default-dashboard plugin from your configuration.

Once you have removed default-dashboard plugin you will need to clean up default-dashboard plugin settings to clear this warning. See Browser Mod documentation using the Learn More button below.
